import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
let a = string.split_whitespace(lines.get(0).ok_or("missing line 1").ok_or_default())

fn parse_list(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    let t = toks.get(i)
    match t
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn get_line(_ lines: List<String>, _ idx: Int) -> String
  match lines.get(idx)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn get_int(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(idx)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
end

let l1 = get_line(lines, 0)
let l2 = get_line(lines, 1)
let xs = parse_list(l1)
let ys = parse_list(l2)

mut k = 0
while k < xs.len()
  let i = get_int(xs, k)
  let j = get_int(ys, k)
  let s = i + j
  println("#{i}+#{j}=#{s}")

end
